languages.original_text: "All these creatures, both unintelligent and alien, are marked by the Undying One, but they balance on the edge between life and death, doomed to the eternal torture of half-existence. The one who turned them into this makes a mockery of the laws of being. I burn with the desire to correct this..."

languages.text: "Все эти создания, и неразумные, и чужаки, отмечены Неумирающим, но балансируют на грани между жизнью и смертью, обреченные на вечную пытку полусуществования. Тот, кто превратил их в это, насмехается над законами бытия. Сколь велико мое желание исправить это..."
languages.translation_comment: discovered strange Necron technology (which turns living creatures into hardlight)

"All these creatures, both unintelligent and alien, are marked by the Undying One, but they balance on the edge between life and death, doomed to the eternal torture of half-existence. The one who turned them into this makes a mockery of the laws of being. I burn with the desire to correct this..."

languages.text: 「この無知で異質な生き物は、不死の者によって刻まれた。生命と死の狭間で、永遠の苦しみを味わう半存在の者たち。彼らをこの姿に変えた者は、存在の法則を嘲笑う。私はこの歪みを正すために燃えている…」
languages.original_text: "All these creatures, both unintelligent and alien, are marked by the Undying One, but they balance on the edge between life and death, doomed to the eternal torture of half-existence. The one who turned them into this makes a mockery of the laws of being. I burn with the desire to correct this..."

traits.locale_text: 「この無知で異質な生き物は、不死の者によって刻まれた。生命と死の狭間で、永遠の苦しみを味わう半存在の者たち。彼らをこの姿に変えた者は、存在の法則を嘲笑う。私はこの歪みを正すために燃えている…」

languages.text: « Toutes ces créatures, à la fois inintelligentes et étrangères, portent la marque de l'Immortel, mais elles se tiennent à la frontière de la vie et de la mort, condamnées à la torture éternelle de la mi-existence. En les transformant ainsi, le responsable bafoue les lois mêmes de la vie. Je brûle du désir de corriger cet outrage... »
languages.original_text: "All these creatures, both unintelligent and alien, are marked by the Undying One, but they balance on the edge between life and death, doomed to the eternal torture of half-existence. The one who turned them into this makes a mockery of the laws of being. I burn with the desire to correct this..."

traits.locale_text: « Toutes ces créatures, à la fois inintelligentes et étrangères, portent la marque de l'Immortel, mais elles se tiennent à la frontière de la vie et de la mort, condamnées à la torture éternelle de la mi-existence. En les transformant ainsi, le responsable bafoue les lois mêmes de la vie. Je brûle du désir de corriger cet outrage... »

languages.text: "All diese Kreaturen, egal ob unintelligent oder außerirdisch, sind vom Todlosen ausersehen, wandeln aber an der Grenze zwischen Leben und Tod und sind zur ewigen Folter der Halbexistenz verdammt. Wer das hier aus ihnen gemacht hat, verspottet die Gesetze des Daseins. In mir brennt das Verlangen, es zu korrigieren ..."
languages.original_text: "All these creatures, both unintelligent and alien, are marked by the Undying One, but they balance on the edge between life and death, doomed to the eternal torture of half-existence. The one who turned them into this makes a mockery of the laws of being. I burn with the desire to correct this..."

Wer das hier aus ihnen gemacht hat, verspottet die Gesetze des Daseins. In mir brennt das Verlangen, es zu korrigieren ..."

languages.text: "Hem zekâsız hem de uzaylı olanlar dâhil tüm bu yaratıklar, Ölmeyen'in işaretlediği ancak yaşamla ölüm arasındaki sınırda dengede duruyor. Yarı varoluşun sonsuz işkencesine mahkûmlar. Onları bu hâle getiren, varoluş yasalarıyla alay ediyor. Bunu düzeltme arzusuyla yanıp tutuşuyorum..."
languages.original_text: "All these creatures, both unintelligent and alien, are marked by the Undying One, but they balance on the edge between life and death, doomed to the eternal torture of half-existence. The one who turned them into this makes a mockery of the laws of being. I burn with the desire to correct this..."

languages.text: «Estas criaturas, tan ajenas a nosotros como desprovistas de intelecto, han sido marcadas por el Inmortal, pero se tambalean en la precaria línea que separa la vida de la muerte, condenadas a la eterna tortura de una realidad estancada. Quien las haya convertido en esto se burla de las leyes de la existencia. Ardo en deseos de enmendarlo...».
languages.original_text: "All these creatures, both unintelligent and alien, are marked by the Undying One, but they balance on the edge between life and death, doomed to the eternal torture of half-existence. The one who turned them into this makes a mockery of the laws of being. I burn with the desire to correct this..."

traits.locale_text: «Estas criaturas, tan ajenas a nosotros como desprovistas de intelecto, han sido marcadas por el Inmortal, pero se tambalean en la precaria línea que separa la vida de la muerte, condenadas a la eterna tortura de una realidad estancada. Quien las haya convertido en esto se burla de las leyes de la existencia. Ardo en deseos de enmendarlo...».

languages.text: “所有这些生物，无论是无智的还是异形的，都烙有不死之神的印记。它们徘徊在生死边缘，注定永受半生不死的无尽折磨。将它们变成这样，是对生命法则的嘲弄。我渴望纠正这一切……”
languages.original_text: "All these creatures, both unintelligent and alien, are marked by the Undying One, but they balance on the edge between life and death, doomed to the eternal torture of half-existence. The one who turned them into this makes a mockery of the laws of being. I burn with the desire to correct this..."
